name: EPI (Holdings) Limited
summary: EPI (Holdings) Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the exploration and production of petroleum in Argentina, Hong Kong, and the People's Republic of China. The company primarily holds an interest in the Cha√É¬±ares Herrados concession located in the Cuyana Basin, Mendoza Province of Argentina.
